welcome.title: Welcome to MarketMind
welcome.description: Your AI-powered financial chart analysis assistant. MarketMind combines advanced charting with AI analysis to help you make informed trading decisions.

aiProvider.title: Choose Your AI Provider
aiProvider.description: MarketMind supports multiple AI providers: OpenAI (GPT-4), Anthropic (Claude), and Google (Gemini). Configure your API keys in the settings to get started.

analyze.title: Analyze Market Data
analyze.description: View real-time kline charts, volume indicators, and moving averages. Use the controls to customize your chart view and select different timeframes.

chat.title: Chat with AI
chat.description: Ask questions about chart patterns, trends, and trading signals. The AI has access to your chart data and can provide technical analysis and insights.

ready.title: Ready to Start
ready.description: Open the settings (top right) to configure your AI provider and API keys. Then start analyzing charts and chatting with your AI assistant!

sensitivity.label: Sensitivity
sensitivity.helper: Controls pivot point detection sensitivity (0 = strict, 100 = permissive)

mode.label: Filtering Mode
mode.helper: Choose between clean (fewer, high-quality patterns) or complete (show all detected patterns)

maxPatterns.label: Maximum Patterns
maxPatterns.helper: Maximum number of patterns to display on chart

enableNested.label: Filter Nested Patterns
enableNested.helper: Remove smaller patterns of the same type that are nested inside larger ones (different types are kept)

enableOverlap.label: Filter Overlapping Patterns
enableOverlap.helper: Remove patterns with high overlap (keeps the most important one)

overlapThreshold.label: Overlap Threshold
overlapThreshold.helper: Minimum overlap percentage to consider patterns as overlapping

highlightConflicts.label: Highlight Conflicting Patterns
highlightConflicts.helper: Show visual indicators when patterns give opposite signals (both patterns are kept)

showChannelCenterline.label: Show Channel Centerline
showChannelCenterline.helper: Display dashed centerline in channel patterns

patterns.supportTooltip: Horizontal price level where buying interest concentrates, preventing further decline. Requires 2+ touches for validation.
patterns.resistanceTooltip: Horizontal price level where selling pressure concentrates, limiting upward movement. Stronger with more touches.
patterns.bullishTrendlineTooltip: Line connecting higher lows, indicating upward momentum. Acts as dynamic support during uptrends.
patterns.bearishTrendlineTooltip: Line connecting lower highs, indicating downward momentum. Acts as dynamic resistance during downtrends.
patterns.fibonacciRetracementTooltip: Key levels (23.6%, 38.2%, 50%, 61.8%, 78.6%) where price often finds support or resistance during pullbacks.
patterns.ascendingChannelTooltip: Parallel upward-sloping lines containing price action. Bullish continuation pattern with clear support and resistance.
patterns.descendingChannelTooltip: Parallel downward-sloping lines containing price action. Bearish continuation pattern indicating sustained downtrend.
patterns.ascendingTriangleTooltip: Flat top with rising lows. Bullish pattern showing buyers getting more aggressive. Breakout usually upward.
patterns.descendingTriangleTooltip: Flat bottom with falling highs. Bearish pattern showing sellers getting more aggressive. Breakout usually downward.
patterns.symmetricalTriangleTooltip: Converging trendlines with lower highs and higher lows. Consolidation pattern - breakout direction uncertain.
patterns.risingWedgeTooltip: Both lines slope upward but converge. Bearish reversal pattern - momentum weakening despite higher prices.
patterns.fallingWedgeTooltip: Both lines slope downward but converge. Bullish reversal pattern - selling pressure diminishing.
patterns.headAndShouldersTooltip: Three peaks with middle highest. Bearish reversal pattern signaling trend exhaustion and potential decline.
patterns.inverseHeadAndShouldersTooltip: Three troughs with middle lowest. Bullish reversal pattern indicating bottom formation and potential rally.
patterns.doubleTopTooltip: Two peaks at similar price ('M' shape). Bearish reversal after failed attempt to break resistance.
patterns.doubleBottomTooltip: Two troughs at similar price ('W' shape). Bullish reversal after support holds twice.
patterns.tripleTopTooltip: Three peaks at similar price. Bearish reversal pattern after multiple failed breakouts.
patterns.tripleBottomTooltip: Three troughs at similar price. Bullish reversal pattern after multiple support holds.
patterns.flagBullishTooltip: Short consolidation after a strong upward move, usually followed by continuation upward.
patterns.flagBearishTooltip: Short consolidation after a strong downward move, usually followed by continuation downward.
patterns.pennantTooltip: Small symmetrical triangle that forms after a sharp move, typically a continuation pattern.
patterns.cupAndHandleTooltip: Rounded bottom followed by a small pullback (handle). Bullish continuation pattern.
patterns.roundingBottomTooltip: Gradual shift from downtrend to uptrend, forming a rounded shape. Bullish reversal.
patterns.gapCommonTooltip: A price gap with little significance, often filled quickly.
patterns.gapBreakawayTooltip: Gap that occurs at the end of a price pattern, signaling the start of a new trend.
patterns.gapRunawayTooltip: Gap that occurs in the middle of a trend, confirming trend strength.
patterns.gapExhaustionTooltip: Gap that occurs near the end of a trend, often signaling a reversal.
patterns.liquidityZoneTooltip: Price area with high trading activity, often acting as support or resistance.
patterns.sellZoneTooltip: Area where selling pressure is expected to increase.
patterns.buyZoneTooltip: Area where buying pressure is expected to increase.
patterns.accumulationZoneTooltip: Area where large players are accumulating positions, often before an uptrend.
patterns.horizontalChannelTooltip: Parallel horizontal lines containing price action. Range-bound market pattern.
patterns.fibonacciExtensionTooltip: Levels used to project possible price targets beyond the current trend.

about.description: An AI-powered trading assistant that combines advanced financial chart visualization with artificial intelligence to provide insights on cryptocurrencies, stocks, and other tradeable assets.

featuresList.charts: Advanced kline charts with moving averages
featuresList.aiAnalysis: AI analysis with OpenAI GPT-4o, Claude 4.5, and Gemini 2.0
featuresList.chat: Interactive chat interface with conversation history
featuresList.security: Secure API key storage with OS-level encryption

about.copyright: © 2025 MarketMind. Built with ❤️ for traders and investors.

tips.confidence: Higher confidence filters show only the strongest setups
tips.algorithmic: Algorithmic detection is faster and more consistent than AI
tips.toolbar: Enable auto-trading via the robot icon in the toolbar

trendFilter.title: Trend Filter
trendFilter.enableDescription: Use EMA 200 to identify the major trend and filter setups
trendFilter.allowCounterDescription: When disabled, only trades aligned with the major trend are allowed

setupConfig.autoTradingDisabledDescription: Auto-trading was automatically disabled because setup detection was turned off.
setupConfig.noSetupsEnabledDescription: Cannot enable auto-trading without active setups. Please enable at least one setup in Settings.

setup91.title: Setup 9.1 (EMA9 Reversal)
setup91.description: Detects EMA9 trend changes with volume confirmation - entry on kline that turns EMA9

setup92.title: Setup 9.2 (EMA9 Pullback)
setup92.description: EMA9 trend follower - entry after kline closes below/above previous low/high during uptrend/downtrend

setup93.title: Setup 9.3 (EMA9 Double Pullback)
setup93.description: EMA9 trend follower - entry after 2 consecutive lower/higher closes from reference kline

setup94.title: Setup 9.4 (EMA9 Continuation)
setup94.description: EMA9 continuation - temporary 1-kline EMA9 failure followed by resumption of original trend

pattern123.title: Pattern 123 (Reversal Pattern)
pattern123.description: Classic 123 pivot pattern with breakout confirmation

bullTrap.title: Bull Trap (Fake Breakout)
bullTrap.description: Detects false breakouts above resistance followed by reversal

bearTrap.title: Bear Trap (Fake Breakdown)
bearTrap.description: Detects false breakdowns below support followed by bounce

breakoutRetest.title: Breakout Retest (Continuation)
breakoutRetest.description: Valid breakout followed by successful retest and continuation

minConfidence.label: Minimum Confidence
minConfidence.helper: Only show setups with confidence above this threshold

equityCurve.title: Equity Curve
equityCurve.description: Performance over time with drawdown overlay

config.title: Backtest Configuration
config.maxPositionHelper: Maximum percentage of capital per trade
config.useAlgorithmicLevelsHelper: Calculate levels based on setup algorithm
config.minProfitHelper: Filter out setups with R:R below this threshold
config.minConfidenceHelper: Only trade setups with confidence above this level
